reviews.review_description:
Update: I was so excited about the October 2025 update. When it got officially pushed back to “soon” in December, I understood. Things are always more complicated than we expect. We’re now about five months past the initial deadline with no changes in update or timeline. I worry that the devs have given up.

I have, however, finished the course. There were some glitches but nothing game breaking. It was a delightful use of my time. I still recommend this game, but don’t expect better graphics anytime soon.

———
This game has many amazing features. The program (so far) is great, the price point is perfect to perhaps a little too cheap, I love the free trial, and it even has a bit of replay ability. I love the atmosphere and the voices are soothing and not grating. The gamification is enough to keep it fun without infantilizing the user.
My only complaint is that the graphics leave a little to be desired, especially in the “outdoors” on my Q3. The home screen is so bad that it gives me a bit of a headache if I look around—which isn’t game killing because you don’t really need to.
If only the graphics that show nature get updated, this would be a seven star game!

I hadn’t tried a course like this before but I was under a huge amount of work pressure and one of my colleagues recommended it. I used a metaquest 2 and 3 and completed 1 to 2 sessions each day. Each lasts approximately 13-22 minutes. When I completed the 8 week course, I went back to the beginning and repeated it.
The course was transformative. After a week or so I could interrupt my reflex thought/association of “bad news = disaster” and use the breathing techniques to calm down and clear my head.
Over the 8 weeks the course teaches you about meditation, assessing your body and breaking negative automatic thought processes. I suspect that my mental health would not have survived without the course and I really recommend it to you, especially as you can buy the complete course for so little right now. If you are having difficulties with work pressure and immediate negative thoughts when problems arise, I strongly recommend the course for you. I hope it gives you as much benefit as I gained.
Great experience, learn full lessons and pleasant guidance! This is how you can make VR worth it! I look forward to more content.

Find it really boring , worst meditation app yet dont like the exercises
, carnt skip parts, wish i could get refund, hope the october update helps when comes out

All I can say is wow. I have purchased a lot of games and apps, especially relaxation and meditation apps, over the years. But this is by far the best ever. It is not only something you can visit for a little down time, it's also an 8 week course, which is just excellent. As I near the end of the MCBT course, I have to say my work stress, which was incredibly severe to the point of almost quitting my stressful job, is SO much better. It has taught me how to cope with the constant negative thoughts. I am not perfect yet, it will take more work, but it has taught me several strategies to improve my coping mechanisms and make life that much less painful at a toxic workplace. 

I honestly feel this app will help thousands of people with anxiety, stress and burnout. It is stunning to be inside, and I love my fish too (you'll have to visit the app to find out what I mean by that!)

Brilliant course built by serious professionals who seem to genuinely want to help people improve their lives. Much needed, in the world we currently live in. 

Highly recommended to everyone. My favourite app on Meta. 

Thank you!

I'm only half an hour in, but it's already clear how well-structured and thoughtfully designed this is. I really enjoyed the sleep meditation — I was so calm I actually fell asleep with my headset still on! The breathing ball is especially useful; my thoughts really slowed as I focused on it and synced my breathing to its rhythm. I'm genuinely looking forward to tomorrow's session.

EDIT
Blackboards all black cant do the sesions!!!
Where can i get help?
Lessen 4 cant do nothing 

in lesson 3 I already had a problem, pick up the cup for you, now I searched for 10 minutes there was no cup anywhere not even after restarting, very unsatisfactory to leave the lesson like this. and with fear you go into the next lessons, and I also do not understand sitting in front of 3 blackboards, where nothing can be seen but completely black???

developer_response.body:
Hi Sylfster.2023

Sorry you've hit this problem! This early release version of Tend requires your headset language be set to English. Please try that and try Tend again and let us know if all is well! We are aiming to fix this issue in a later version. If you can get a refund please also do that and we will happily give you Tend for free if you email us at support@tend-vr.com.

Kind regards, The Tend Team

reviews.review_description: The instructor and the environments are both solid. There are a lot of interesting ideas and a lot of creativity and thought went into this. Would love even more sessions and I hope the creators of this app continue adding content.

Got it yesterday and enjoy the calm voice and the atmosphere very much. The obly thing I‘m wondering: should there be content on the challboards? They stay black during the sessions. Is this normal? Otherwise: great!

I have to admit - I was sceptical at first - but this programme has personally helped me and my mental health enormously. It relaxes my tendency to overthink and over-conclude, while it also creates an intriguing and relaxing environment that I want to return to. I’m really glad I completed the eight week course and I still use the mindfulness skills I learned every day through meditation practice. I cannot wait to see how the programme further develops. 
Dr D Anderson, psychiatrist
